name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Update Client LOLBIN
notes:
This Building Block detects code execution via the Windows Update client.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: FPT.EagleEye Team
SIGMA Title: Windows Update Client LOLBIN
SIGMA Description: Detects code execution via the Windows Update client (wuauclt)


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Update Client LOLBIN on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of wuauclt.exe
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/updatedeploymentprovider%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/runhandlercomserver%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.dll%') AQL filter query
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /classid %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% wuaueng.dll %') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Update Client LOLBIN on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of wuauclt.exe
AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/updatedeploymentprovider%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/runhandlercomserver%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.dll%') AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /classid %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% wuaueng.dll %') AQL filter query
